reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNfLU5MX2tnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Es una parada obligatoria, para los que veníamos del norte,la atención regular a  amable(shop), pero no atentos.
Si eligen para comer, pues no lo hagan no hay nada más que un sándwich de mila

(Translated by Google)
It's a must-stop for those of us coming from the north. The service was average, friendly (in the shop), but not attentive.
If you choose to eat, don't do it. There's nothing better than a mila sandwich.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNfdUxXWXF3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Hostería simple pero económica y limpia. Ideal para descansar y seguir viaje.

(Translated by Google)
A simple but affordable and clean guesthouse. Ideal for resting before continuing your journey.

reviews.comment:

Very poor service from the older man who works at the convenience store.

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
It needs cleaning, tidiness, air conditioning, and an automatic door to prevent the cold air from escaping.

reviews.comment:
Mi experiencia inolvidable , olvide mi cartera con todo mi dinero y los chicos me atendieron d ella mejor manera solucionando me el problema , vivo en la provincia de jujuy tenemos seis horas d viaje de diferencia y lo solucionaron ,felicidades!!!!!!!!

(Translated by Google)
My unforgettable experience! I forgot my wallet with all my money, and the guys helped me in the best way, solving the problem for me. I live in the province of Jujuy, we have a six-hour travel time difference, and they solved it. Congratulations!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR2X29QZ25BRRAB

reviews.comment:
Lindo lugar tanto como la atención del shop y los del surtidor.Aria falta unos arbolitos o un poco de estacionamiento con sombra .

(Translated by Google)
Nice place, both the service at the shop and the gas station. It could use some trees or a bit of shaded parking.

reviewReply.comment: Hola Buen dia! muchas gracias por su comentario. Saludos!
